success_criteria: Faster repeatable workflow across different site layout files
recommended_python: py310 (C:\Program Files\Python310\python.exe) — has click + all geometry libs. No install needed.

tier_1_available_now.description: Already installed and working. Run these phases with ZERO installs.

libraries.note: DXF I/O, entity iteration, hatch, render

tools.use: Layer name classification, semantic matching — Phase 4 AI enhancement
Vector search for layer alias lookup — Phase 4

scripts_reusable.pattern: Color detection + expanding-radius spatial search -> reuse in layer classification
Correct ezdxf 1.4.x render API -> base for report preview
SOLID hatch pattern -> base for Phase 5 hatch gen

tier_2_missing_essential_mvp.description: Required for MVP phases 1-6, NOT yet installed — but very few gaps.
tier_2_missing_essential_mvp.verdict: NONE BLOCKING. All core phases (1-5) are unblocked on py310.

tier_3_missing_deferrable.description: Useful for later phases or optimisation — NOT needed for phases 1-5.

items.why_deferrable: Spatial index speedup for large drawings. Only blocks Phase 3 on very large files (>100k entities). py312 already has rtree 1.4.1; py310 can use cKDTree which is sufficient.
Geographic coordinate transforms (CRS). Not needed for pure DXF processing without geo-referencing. Only relevant if drawings need WGS84/BNG coordinate output.
Better CLI UX. argparse fallback is complete — every command works. Cosmetic improvement only.
py310 already has click. argparse fallback covers py312. Only needed if py312 becomes the primary run env.
3D mesh processing. Needed for Phase 6 3ds Max / site model preparation only. py310 already has trimesh 4.11.1.

phase_readiness.phase_3_gap_closer: COMPLETE — 6310 -> 2022 open polys on Roman Gardens at 1m tolerance
phase_readiness.phase_4_normalizer: READY TO START — PyYAML, pydantic, ezdxf all present
phase_readiness.phase_5_hatch: READY TO START — shapely, networkx, ezdxf all present
phase_readiness.phase_6_max_export: NOT YET STARTED — 3dsmax-mcp installed, needs design work

next_action: Run Phase 4: normalize-layers on roman_gardens_gapclosed.dxf. Check unknown-layer coverage. Expand config/layer_aliases.yaml.
